data.title: Caterpillar Invests in the Future of Texas' Manufacturing Workforce
data.description: The investment will primarily target the reduction of obstacles to training, the identification of sought-after skills for upcoming jobs, and the facilitation of individuals’ access to careers in advanced manufacturing. Texas State Technical College, Manufacturing Institute, and various local organizations are collaborating to drive this initiative forward. Situated in Irving, Texas, this concerted effort aims to bolster the workforce by providing essential resources and guidance to individuals seeking opportunities in the manufacturing sector.

data.title: Rockpoint and The Kolter Group Announce Joint Venture to Develop The Sutton in Palm Beach Gardens, Florida
data.description: A Class A apartment community spanning five stories is set to be developed on a 17.6-acre site in Boston and Palm Beach Gardens. The project has received financing from PNC Bank. Rockpoint, a real estate private equity firm based in Boston, and The Kolter Group, a diversified real estate company based in Florida, are collaborating on this venture. The financing deal was finalized on July 2, 2026.

data.title: BETR ELEVATES KEY LEADERSHIP WITH PROMOTION OF ALEX URSA TO CHIEF OPERATING OFFICER, ALEX KUWADA TO CHIEF MARKETING OFFICER, AND MIKE DENEVI TO CHIEF CONTENT OFFICER
data.description: The Chief Operating Officer (COO) of Ursa will take charge of product development and operations, supervising the creation of the pioneering super app in the industry. The Chief Marketing Officer (CMO) Kuwada will be responsible for managing acquisition, retention, VIP services, and other prominent commercial operations. The Chief Content Officer (CCO) Denevi will oversee content creation and brand strategy for the leading real money gaming brand with a significant following.

data.title: Coway Launches Airmega Mighty2, Earns iF and Red Dot Design Awards 2026
data.description: Coway recently unveiled the latest upgrade of their popular Airmega Mighty air purifier model in Los Angeles on July 2, 2026. The new version boasts a sleek and award-winning design, along with receiving top performance recognition from Wirecutter. Coway, a prominent wellness tech brand, confirmed that the enhanced flagship air purifier features advanced technologies to improve air quality.

data.title: Robot.com Named Official Robotics Partner of LEAP East, Bringing R-ads to Asia for the First Time
data.description: Autonomous robots that are currently executing brand campaigns in over 20 countries have made their debut in Hong Kong, where they are showcased live on the exhibition floor. The event features a keynote address by co-founder Judah Longgrear. On July 2, 2026, in San Francisco, Robot.com, the pioneering company in deploying autonomous robots for practical applications, made this announcement.

data.title: NITRO CIRCUS TAKES DINNER TO NEW HEIGHTS WITH WORLD-FIRST "DINNER FOR 6" SKYDIVING STUNT
data.description: In Arizona, six skydivers recently embarked on a thrilling adventure by exiting a plane to share a unique mid-air dining experience during a freefall from 13,000 feet. This exhilarating spectacle, part of the latest Nitro Circus event, showcased high-resolution images and video footage capturing the daredevils in action. The event, which took place on July 2, 2026, left viewers in awe of the breathtaking stunt performed by the skilled skydivers.

data.title: Beyond the Hype: Nearly 200 Higher Education Leaders Convene to Advance the Hard Work of Responsible AI Adoption
data.description: Higher education leaders, including presidents, provosts, and student success officials, are gathering in Chicago on July 2, 2026 to discuss creating governance structures needed for the adoption of AI in support of postsecondary completion and success. Complete College America (CCA), a coalition of states, is spearheading this effort. This conference aims to address the challenges and opportunities presented by AI in ensuring student achievement.
FY27 Q1 revenue conference call for Soitec scheduled.

data.title: In HelloNation, Moving Expert Dan Hudson Explains the Factors That Influence Local Moving Costs
data.description: A recent piece discusses the main aspects impacting the pricing and organization of moving services. Revealed on July 2, 2026, in COMSTOCK PARK, Mich., the article addresses the question "What influences the expense of a local move?" HelloNation delves into this query with input from Dan Hudson of Scully Statewide, shedding light on crucial factors affecting the rates.

data.title: Cosentus Launches Zeus AI, the Most Sophisticated RCM AI Platform in the World
data.description: A new AI-powered Revenue Cycle Management (RCM) engine called Zeus AI has been introduced by Cosentus in Irvine, California. This innovative system is designed to seamlessly integrate with any Electronic Health Record (EHR) platform. Operated by specialized industry experts, Zeus AI aims to enhance RCM efficiencies.

data.title: In HelloNation, Rural Land Expert Cindy Garvey Outlines What to Know About Acreage Buying
data.description: An article by HelloNation in Franklin, Tennessee on July 2, 2026, discusses the essential elements influencing the real value of rural and vacant land transactions. The article provides valuable insights for potential buyers looking to purchase acreage, emphasizing key factors that play a crucial role in determining the worth of such properties. Through a practical analysis, the piece highlights the significance of various considerations in making informed decisions when investing in land.

data.title: In HelloNation, Roofing Expert Brian Dyck Explains When Roof Repair Is the Right Choice
data.description: In Merced, California on July 2, 2026, experts are emphasizing the importance of evaluating roof damage based on factors like age, wear, and material condition. The decision to repair a roof is crucial when signs such as ceiling stains or water leaks emerge. Property owners must assess the extent of the damage accurately to determine the necessary measures. A thorough inspection is recommended to gauge the severity of the issue and prevent further complications. Making informed choices about roof repairs can save homeowners from costly repairs in the future.
Outcomes from shareholder meeting on June 25, 2026, including voting results on submitted resolutions.

data.title: Mark your calendars! Q2 2026 results and conference call on Thursday, July 30, 2026. Don't miss out!
data.description: In the latest report, it has been revealed that a total of 1,500 individuals were affected by the recent cyber attack. The attack, which occurred last week, targeted a popular social media platform and compromised personal information such as names, email addresses, and passwords. Authorities have confirmed that investigations are ongoing to determine the source of the attack and ensure the security of user data moving forward. Users are advised to update their passwords and enable two-factor authentication as a precautionary measure. The platform has apologized for the incident and assured users of their commitment to enhancing cybersecurity measures to prevent similar breaches in the future.
URW SE reports total voting rights and shares in share capital as of June 30, 2026.
Freddie Mac: US 30-yr fixed-rate mortgage averages 6.43% in July's 2nd week vs 6.49% prior week.

data.title: Suominen Corporation's rights issue fully subscribed with final results.
data.description: In a recent update, it has been reported that the total number of confirmed COVID-19 cases worldwide has surpassed 10 million, with the global death toll reaching over 500,000. The United States continues to have the highest number of cases, exceeding 2.5 million, while Brazil follows with over 1.3 million cases. In terms of deaths, the U.S. has seen more than 125,000 fatalities, with Brazil recording over 57,000. Experts are emphasizing the importance of continued vigilance and adherence to preventative measures to curb the spread of the virus.

data.title: Mortgage Rates Decline
data.description: Freddie Mac of McLean, Virginia, released the latest data on July 2, 2026, revealing that the 30-year fixed-rate mortgage (FRM) had an average of 6.43% according to its Primary Mortgage Market Survey ® (PMMS ® ).

data.title: BPCE and Nexity announce plans for a strategic partnership in the distribution of new and renovated homes
data.description: BPCE and Nexity have unveiled a collaboration to enhance the distribution of 15,000 new and refurbished homes. This strategic partnership aims to strengthen their presence in the real estate market through a joint effort.
Kepler Cheuvreux manages liquidity contract for Exosens in latest half-year report; provides vital updates.
